mapper.select: select t1.* , t2.orgn_nm , (CASE WHEN c.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN b.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'I' WHEN a.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'W' ELSE 'C' END) AS approval_status from esg.tb_emergency_response_training t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id left join esg.tb_approval_info a on a.target_type = t1.doc_type and a.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no and a.param = 'writer' left join esg.tb_approval_info b on b.target_type = t1.doc_type and b.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no and b.param = 'reviewer' left join esg.tb_approval_info c on c.target_type = t1.doc_type and c.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no and c.param = 'approver' where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} order by t2.ord_seq asc, t1.use_yn desc, t2.orgn_nm asc
mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_emergency_response_training where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_response_training ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, orgn_id, comp_id, training_nm, training_location, training_content, anticipated_damage, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{orgnId}, #{compId}, #{trainingNm}, #{trainingLocation}, #{trainingContent}, #{anticipatedDamage}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docSeq from esg.tb_emergency_response_training_scenario where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_response_training_scenario ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_id, target_time, situation, performer, method_action, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{compId}, #{targetTime}, #{situation}, #{performer}, #{methodAction}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.comp_id from esg.tb_emergency_response_training t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId}
